headline: Norton Genie Expands to Claude, Bringing AI-Powered Scam Detection into Everyday Conversations
summary: Scams today touch every part of our lives. They show up in text messages, social posts, online marketplaces, dating apps, fake customer support chats, and increasingly through AI-generated content designed to feel personal and convincing. As more people turn to AI assistants to help them navigate daily decisions, Norton, part of Gen (NASDAQ: GEN), is bringing its Norton Genie AI-powered scam detector into Claude conversations.

thumbnail.caption: Norton Genie AI-powered scam detection now available in Claude, ChatGPT and Norton 360.
